text.title: previous-response-id-reasoning-reuse Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for previous-response-id-reasoning-reuse as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Treating .output items like chat completions and storing only the assistant text plus tool calls.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Reasoning items are the part the model needs to continue its thought; without them every turn restarts cognition.

failure-mode.description: Using encrypted-content round-trip when the deployment does NOT have a ZDR requirement.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pays the encryption tax for no compliance benefit; previous_response_id is cheaper and equivalent for stored deployments.

failure-mode.description: Passing previous_response_id with store=false and assuming reasoning carries forward.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The id resolves to nothing because nothing was stored; the call succeeds but reasoning is lost — silent regression on quality.
